name: Kolacky
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fat-free cottage cheese, small curd
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. To prepare pastry, combine flour, 16 ozs cream cheese, and 4 sticks of butter in a mixing bowl. Beat until thoroughly combined. Cover and chill until easy to handle. On a sugared surface, roll each dough to 1/8 inch thick and cut into 2 x 2-inch squares using scalloped pastry wheel. Add about a teaspoon of filling in the center of each square. Fold opposite corners to the center with one overlapping the other. Moisten the corners to help them stick together. Lightly brush with water and sprinkle with sugar. Bake 12 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
To prepare cream cheese filling, combine remaining cream cheese, 1 tablespoon margarine, 1/2 cup sugar, and lemon juice in a mixing bowl. To prepare cottage cheese filling, press as much moisture out of cottage cheese as possible. In a mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, sugar, and cinnamon until blended.
To prepare cherry filling, combine cherry pie filling, allspice, and rum extract in a mixing bowl. To prepare pineapple filling, combine pineapple, 1/2 cup granulated sugar, and 1/3 cup water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and boil gently for 25 minutes, or until thickened, stirring occasionally. Watch closely during last 5 minutes to prevent sticking.
Spread apricot pie filling in the center of each square.
